slices.acceptanceCmd: bun run check && bun test && bun run build

slices.intent: Backend discovery + ignore-layering (hidden/gitignore/vpconfig) + layered config (defaults<ENV<file<CLI) + kind classification. Wire /api/tree to real discovery. Symlinks NOT followed; path/ext security.
slices.acceptanceCmd: bun run check && bun test tests/server/discovery.test.ts tests/server/config.test.ts

slices.intent: Client shell (Mantine AppShell, dark/light persisted), directory-tree sidebar + filename filter, markdown (.md via react-markdown+gfm) + plaintext (.txt) render, routing / and /doc/*. TanStack Query hooks useTree/useDoc.
slices.acceptanceCmd: bun run check && bun test tests/client/TreeSidebar.test.tsx tests/client/Markdown.test.tsx

slices.intent: MDX runtime render (@mdx-js/mdx evaluate + provider) with 4 custom blocks: Callout, CodeTabs, Decision, HtmlBlock. Parse-error boundary -> error card. Frontmatter parsed server-side.
slices.acceptanceCmd: bun run check && bun test tests/client/blocks.test.tsx tests/client/Mdx.test.tsx

slices.intent: Content search: prose-strip (remark) + bun:sqlite in-memory FTS5 (BM25 + snippet), text files only. Wire /api/search. Mantine search UI (file + snippet hits).
slices.acceptanceCmd: bun run check && bun test tests/server/prose.test.ts tests/server/search-index.test.ts tests/client/SearchBox.test.tsx

slices.intent: Syntax highlight (@shikijs/rehype, theme-aware) for Markdown + Mdx pipelines; Mermaid (lang=mermaid fence -> <Mermaid> component, theme-aware, error notice).
slices.acceptanceCmd: bun run check && bun test tests/client/Mermaid.test.tsx tests/client/highlight.test.tsx

slices.intent: Non-text viewers + raw endpoint. /api/raw/* streams bytes (correct Content-Type, PATH-CONFINED, traversal-reject). HtmlView sandboxed iframe srcdoc (no allow-scripts/same-origin). PdfView + ImageView via raw. Load-fail placeholders.
slices.acceptanceCmd: bun run check && bun test tests/server/raw.test.ts tests/client/HtmlView.test.tsx

slices.intent: CLI (citty): positional <dir>, flags --port/--host/--title/--open/--include/--exclude/--hidden/--no-gitignore, --help/--version. Lifecycle: banner, bad-root exit, port auto-fallback, graceful shutdown, --open via 'open'.
slices.acceptanceCmd: bun run check && bun test tests/server/cli.test.ts tests/server/port.test.ts

slices.intent: Live reload: chokidar watcher (ignore-aware, ~150ms debounce) -> /api/events SSE; incremental search-index upsert/remove + tree re-scan. Client EventSource -> TanStack Query invalidation; disconnect banner + auto-retry.
slices.acceptanceCmd: bun run check && bun test tests/server/watcher.test.ts

slices.intent: Error/empty states (shared ErrorCard: parse-error, not-found, empty, too-large, undecodable, no-results, SSE-disconnected) + loading skeletons + README. Playwright E2E smoke (podman): list -> open MDX -> Callout + highlighted code render -> search -> open hit.
slices.acceptanceCmd: bun run check && bun test && bun run e2e

seedKnowledge.name: playwright-podman-e2e
seedKnowledge.body: E2E runs in Podman (official Playwright image v1.59.1-noble matched to @playwright/test@1.59.1). bun run e2e -> scripts/e2e.sh: build on host, then podman run npx playwright test. No nix PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH, no playwright install. webServer uses npx (not bunx) inside container. See .claude/rules/playwright-podman-e2e.md.
